name: Multi-Agent Robotic Control with Onboard Vision-Language Models (2607.07403)

digest_notes: VLMs and VLAs have shown promise in robotic control yet face challenges regarding explainability and generalization. This paper presents a MAS architecture that deploys specialized agents on onboard hardware eliminating dependence on external compute. A novel Megamind orchestration agent mitigates context retention issues inherent to long-horizon planning with smaller models.
